description: Noosh provides a platform for managing print, packaging, and marketing supply-chain workflows. Its public developer presence appears to center on a REST-style API covering workgroups, projects, files, contacts, orders, invoices, and related business objects.
summary: Noosh exposes one documented HTTP API surface via Swagger UI; public docs and mirrored OpenAPI metadata exist, but I could not verify its concrete auth mechanism from the available documentation.
